final:
module top_module(output reg [7:0] reg_0x45, input wire reset, input wire wenb, input wire [7:0] in_data, input wire clk);always@(posedge clk)
    begin
        if(reset==0) begin
            if(wenb==0)
                reg_0x45<=in_data;
            else
                reg_0x45<=reg_0x45;
        end
        else
            reg_0x45<=8'h00;
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      reg_0x45 <= ~reg_0x45;
    end
  end

endmodule
